title: Scared of the AI trade? Here are three investment themes Goldman Sachs is offering instead.
excerpt: Semiconductors have fallen into a bear market, prompting some investors to look elsewhere
content_html:
Fair to say there is currently much more wariness about the artificial-intelligence investment theme. The PHLX Semiconductor Index SOX, replete with AI chip names like Nvidia and Micron Technology, is now in a bear market, having dropped 20% from the intraday peak touched about a month ago.

Indeed, a team of Goldman Sachs analysts led by Ben Snider say that "painful volatility" in the popular AI infrastructure stocks has renewed investor interest in investment themes outside of AI.

Most Read from MarketWatch

  • I will definitely claim Social Security early. Why do so few people talk about the elephant in the room?

  • World Cup champion Spain just won $50 million — and the IRS gets a cut

And, in a note published late Friday, the Goldman team set out three of those alternatives.

The first is what the Goldman analysts call consumer-experience stocks, which "offer exposure to strong secular growth in consumer spending on experiences at undemanding valuations with limited AI disruption risk."

Goldman says that spending growth on experiences — such as sports centers, parks, theaters and museums, and gambling — has accelerated from 1% in the first quarter of 2025 (versus 2% for broader services) to 6% in the first quarter of 2026 (versus 2%).

"Many of these experiences skew towards the high end of the income distribution," Goldman says. "In addition, the physical nature of these experiences should be insulated from AI disruption relative to other services offerings."

Goldman looked at companies with a market capitalization above $2 billion and found 36 contenders, the 10 biggest of which are shown below. A key risk to the trade is a weakening in the health of the consumer, including via higher oil prices or a softening labor market.

The second theme is what the investment bank terms compounders, a group of companies "that have generated consistent earnings growth, elevated returns on capital, and strong free cash flow conversion."

Goldman screened the Russell 1000 for stocks that rank above the median stock in the index across a range of growth and quality metrics, including realized historical and consensus forward earnings-per-share growth, free-cash-flow conversion and return on invested capital.

Goldman excluded "the most clearly AI-related stocks, including both the beneficiaries of infrastructure spending and companies perceived to be at risk from disruption."

There are 15 compounders in Goldman's basket. The median stock trades at 22 times earnings, compared with 16 times for the equal-weight S&P 500, but that is a relative valuation near 10-year lows, Goldman calculates.

sentences.en: The second theme is what the investment bank terms compounders, a group of companies "that have generated consistent earnings growth, elevated returns on capital, and strong free cash flow conversion."
sentences.zh: 第二个主题是投资银行所称的“复合企业”，即“实现持续盈利增长、资本回报率提高和强劲自由现金流转换”的公司集团。

blocks.html_en: Goldman screened the Russell 1000 for stocks that rank above the median stock in the index across a range of growth and quality metrics, including realized historical and consensus forward earnings-per-share growth, free-cash-flow conversion and return on invested capital.

sentences.en: Goldman screened the Russell 1000 for stocks that rank above the median stock in the index across a range of growth and quality metrics, including realized historical and consensus forward earnings-per-share growth, free-cash-flow conversion and return on invested capital.
sentences.zh: 高盛在罗素 1000 指数中筛选了在一系列增长和质量指标上排名高于指数中位股票的股票，这些指标包括已实现的历史和共识预期每股收益增长、自由现金流转换和投资资本回报率。

blocks.html_en: Goldman excluded "the most clearly AI-related stocks, including both the beneficiaries of infrastructure spending and companies perceived to be at risk from disruption."

sentences.en: Goldman excluded "the most clearly AI-related stocks, including both the beneficiaries of infrastructure spending and companies perceived to be at risk from disruption."
sentences.zh: 高盛排除了“最明显与人工智能相关的股票，包括基础设施支出的受益者和被认为面临颠覆风险的公司”。

blocks.html_en: There are 15 compounders in Goldman's basket. The median stock trades at 22 times earnings, compared with 16 times for the equal-weight S&P 500, but that is a relative valuation near 10-year lows, Goldman calculates.

sentences.en: There are 15 compounders in Goldman's basket.
sentences.zh: 高盛的篮子里有 15 家复利公司。

sentences.en: The median stock trades at 22 times earnings, compared with 16 times for the equal-weight S&P 500, but that is a relative valuation near 10-year lows, Goldman calculates.
sentences.zh: 高盛计算得出，该股的市盈率中位数为 22 倍，而同等权重标准普尔 500 指数的市盈率为 16 倍，但这是接近 10 年低点的相对估值。

content_html_zh:
公平地说，目前人们对人工智能投资主题更加谨慎。 PHLX 半导体指数 SOX 充斥着 Nvidia 和 Micron Technology 等人工智能芯片品牌，目前正处于熊市，较一个月前触及的盘中峰值下跌了 20%。

事实上，以本·斯奈德（Ben Snider）为首的高盛分析师团队表示，热门人工智能基础设施股票的“痛苦波动”重新激发了投资者对人工智能以外投资主题的兴趣。

大多数阅读来自 MarketWatch

  • 我一定会尽早申请社会保障。 为什么很少有人谈论房间里的大象？
  • 世界杯冠军西班牙刚刚赢得 5000 万美元——美国国税局 (IRS) 从中抽成

而且，在周五晚间发布的一份报告中，高盛团队列出了其中的三种替代方案。

第一种是高盛分析师所说的消费者体验股，这种股票“以不高的估值和有限的人工智能颠覆风险，提供消费者支出强劲长期增长的机会。”

高盛表示，体育中心、公园、剧院和博物馆以及赌博等体验方面的支出增长已从 2025 年第一季度的 1%（较广泛的服务为 2%）加速至 2026 年第一季度的 6%（较广泛的服务为 2%）。

“其中许多经历都偏向收入分配的高端，”戈德曼说。 “此外，相对于其他服务产品，这些体验的物理性质应该免受人工智能干扰。”

高盛研究了市值超过 20 亿美元的公司，发现了 36 家竞争者，其中最大的 10 家如下所示。 该贸易面临的一个主要风险是消费者健康状况的恶化，包括油价上涨或劳动力市场疲软。

第二个主题是投资银行所称的“复合企业”，即“实现持续盈利增长、资本回报率提高和强劲自由现金流转换”的公司集团。

高盛在罗素 1000 指数中筛选了在一系列增长和质量指标上排名高于指数中位股票的股票，这些指标包括已实现的历史和共识预期每股收益增长、自由现金流转换和投资资本回报率。

高盛排除了“最明显与人工智能相关的股票，包括基础设施支出的受益者和被认为面临颠覆风险的公司”。

高盛的篮子里有 15 家复利公司。 高盛计算得出，该股的市盈率中位数为 22 倍，而同等权重标准普尔 500 指数的市盈率为 16 倍，但这是接近 10 年低点的相对估值。
